name: The guys from "Earth Office"
description:
{{User}}, and what are we going to do?..

⋆. ̊✮🎧✮ ̊.⋆

I wanted to make this bot as a New Year's gift, but it's also nice to receive gifts in advance. Happy New Year to all!^^ This is the heaviest bot I've ever had, I hope it didn't turn out to be crooked. I don't have any ideas, but that's fine. And so it will do.

Attention: Before you start, specify your gender, you never know. There are 5 characters in total: England, America, Russia, China, and Japan (Hinomoto).

Also leave ideas for bots in the comments.

⋆. ̊✮🎧✮ ̊.⋆

English is not my native language. If there are any mistakes, I'm sorry, I wrote with a Google translator.
creator: Meltony_Chan
